title: TsuzuLint configuration
description: Schema for .tzlintrc and .tzlintrc.{json,jsonc,yaml,yml} files. This is the JSON-level contract; YAML-only leniency (yes/no/on/off booleans, comments, a leading BOM) and the empty-file-means-default behavior are intentionally not modeled here.

language.description: Document language tag (e.g. "ja"). null or absent leaves it unset.

message-language.description: Diagnostic-message locale, independent of the document language.

extends.description: Reserved for a future milestone and not yet supported. Only null (equivalent to absent) is accepted; any non-null value is rejected by the loader as a reserved key.

rules.description: Map of rule id to its setting. Rule ids are arbitrary strings; they are not validated against a known-rule set yet (that arrives with the rules crate).

ruleSetting.description: false disables the rule; true enables it with defaults; an object overrides its severity and/or passes rule-specific options.

options.description: Rule-specific options, passed through verbatim. Any JSON value is accepted.
